list.name: 更改
list.comment:
feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

task.summary:
feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

MESSAGE.value:
feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(backend): integrate firebase auth with firestore and implement server-side category filtering
- Eradicated hardcoded seller metadata by dynamically binding `sellerUid` to `auth.currentUser.uid`. - Implemented a global authentication session observer using `onAuthStateChanged` to secure database write operations. - Added developer authentication simulation tools (`signInAnonymously` and `signOut`) within the test environment. - Engineered server-side query filtration logic (`getListingsByCategory`) and single-document retrieval (`getListingById`). - Resolved index latency by provisioning cloud-side B-Tree Composite Indexes for compound state queries. - Updated all core scripts (`firebase-config.js`, `db-services.js`, `test.js`, `app.js`) to full-text English documentation standards.
